lede: A look at October 14 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Betty Heidler and Dwight D. Eisenhower, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: John Deere
events.desc: About 10,000 American employees of John Deere go on strike.

events.title: Felix Baumgartner
events.desc: Felix Baumgartner successfully jumps to Earth from a balloon in the stratosphere.

events.title: 6th Congress of the Workers' Party of Korea
events.desc: The 6th Congress of the Workers' Party ended, having anointed North Korean President Kim Il Sung's son Kim Jong Il as his successor.

events.title: B. R. Ambedkar
events.desc: Dr. B. R. Ambedkar, leader of India's Untouchable caste, converts to Buddhism along with 385,000 of his followers (see Neo-Buddhism).

events.title: Second Philippine Republic
events.desc: World War II: The Second Philippine Republic, a puppet state of Japan, is inaugurated with José P. Laurel as its president.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: The German submarine U-47 sinks the British battleship HMS Royal Oak within her harbour at Scapa Flow, Scotland.

events.title: Louis Le Prince
events.desc: Louis Le Prince films the first motion picture, Roundhay Garden Scene.

events.title: American Civil War
events.desc: American Civil War: Confederate troops under the command of A. P. Hill fail to drive the Union Army completely out of Virginia.

events.title: War of the Third Coalition
events.desc: War of the Third Coalition: A French corps defeats an Austrian attempt to escape encirclement at Ulm.

events.title: Norman Conquest
events.desc: The Norman conquest of England begins with the Battle of Hastings.

births.name: Dwight D. Eisenhower
births.line: American general and politician, 34th President of the United States

births.name: François Bozizé
births.line: Gabonese general and politician, President of the Central African Republic

deaths.text: Ashawna Hailey, American computer scientist and philanthropist
Sophie of Mecklenburg-Güstrow, queen of Denmark and Norway

observances.text: Christian feast day: Intercession of the Theotokos
Day of the Cathedral of the Living Pillar (Georgian Orthodox Church)
